series_metadata.series_description: Record documents disaster assistance services to eligible recipients when the Governor declares a state of emergency in a particular county or area of Ohio. Files include, but are not limited to, alert bulletins announcing a disaster; federal disaster regulations; county adult disaster assistance plans; Family Assistance disaster policy, guidance and instruction memoranda; applications for relief assistance from the affected county; and correspondence documenting the type of services provided (e.g., food, shelter, clothing, food assistance through electronic benefit transfer, and repairs or replacements), including available funding and amount of coverage for those services.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office updated by county, state or federal agency are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: in office updated by county, state or federal agency are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved
